title: Hook for detecting iOS PWA standalone mode for adjusted UI
scenario_context: Detect iOS PWA standalone via window.navigator.standalone — different from display-mode: standalone.
responsive_reasoning: 1. iOS has navigator.standalone property.\n2. Combined with display-mode for cross-browser.\n3. Adjust UI accordingly.

title: Banner with image + text that swaps order or stacks per container
scenario_context: Promo banner with image and text. Sometimes image left, sometimes right, sometimes top. Container-driven.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container query.\n2. Order swappable.\n3. Variant prop for direction.

title: Caption text with subtle italic emphasis that scales with image
scenario_context: Image caption italic, subtle. Should be 80% of body size via em.
responsive_reasoning: 1. em-based.\n2. Italic for distinction.\n3. Constrained to image width.

title: Vertical rhythm in CSS via :is(h1, h2, h3) margin patterns
scenario_context: Headings get top margin (space before) and small bottom margin. Consistent rhythm.
responsive_reasoning: 1. :is() selector for groups.\n2. Consistent rhythm.\n3. Modifiable in one place.

title: Magnifier for fine detail on touch via long-press loupe
scenario_context: Image with fine detail. Long-press shows magnifier loupe (like iOS text selection magnifier).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Long-press initiates loupe.\n2. CSS transform scale + mask.\n3. Touch-only feature.
accessibility_across_viewports: Touch-only enhancement; provide zoom controls as alternative.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Touch-specific precision. 2) Native gesture. 3) Alt for non-touch.

title: Search bar in modal that focuses without scrolling page
scenario_context: Modal opens with auto-focused search. Should keep page scroll position frozen.
responsive_reasoning: 1. focus({ preventScroll: true }).\n2. Modal handles its own scroll.\n3. Body locked.

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Modal opens, input focused, no page scroll

accessibility_across_viewports: Focus moves to modal as expected.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) preventScroll API. 2) Clean modal UX. 3) Universal.

title: Loading screen full-bleed with safe area aware progress indicator
scenario_context: App loading. Full-screen background. Spinner + text in safe area.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Background full-bleed.\n2. Content in safe area.\n3. Centered safe content.

title: PDF viewer that shows single page portrait, two pages landscape (book mode)
scenario_context: PDF reader. Portrait: 1 page. Landscape: 2 pages side-by-side.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Orientation drives.\n2. Single page portrait fits screen.\n3. Two pages landscape utilizes width.
solution: // Similar to responsive-175 (e-reader)\n// PDF library renders pages; layout switches columns per orientation.
edge_cases_handled: Last page odd — single in spread

title: iPad sidebar with collapsible state across page navigation
scenario_context: iPad app with sidebar. Navigation between pages preserves sidebar state (collapsed/expanded).
responsive_reasoning: 1. State in context/localStorage.\n2. Survives navigation.\n3. Per user preference.
solution: // See responsive-154 for full collapsible sidebar pattern. State is in localStorage so survives navigation.

title: Three-pane code review (file tree + diff + comments)
scenario_context: Code review like GitHub. File tree + diff view + comments sidebar. Mobile: just diff with tab nav.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Multi-pane desktop.\n2. Tabbed mobile.\n3. Same data.

layout_strategy.information_density_changes: Mobile shows one section at a time

what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Asymmetric collapse. 2) Tabs on mobile. 3) Diff primary.

title: Cell tooltip with full content on hover for truncated cells
scenario_context: Long content truncated. Hover or focus shows full content tooltip.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Custom tooltip for accessibility.\n2. Touch tap reveals.\n3. Per responsive-035.
accessibility_across_viewports: aria-label provides full content for SR.

title: Slider with two thumbs for range (min/max)
scenario_context: Price range slider with two thumbs. Min and max. Touch and keyboard support.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Two thumbs.\n2. Each draggable.\n3. Keyboard support each.

detection_strategy.code_pattern: Two range inputs overlapping with logic

title: Image lazy loading with native + intersection observer fallback unified
scenario_context: Per responsive-043. Universal lazy load.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native loading=lazy primary.\n2. IO fallback.\n3. Shared observer.
solution: // See responsive-043 LazyImage for full implementation.

title: Hamburger that animates between bars and X without layout shift
scenario_context: Hamburger icon (3 bars) animates to X when menu opens. CSS-only animation.
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS transforms.\n2. Three bars rotate/translate.\n3. Smooth.

title: Date picker as inline calendar on wide and dialog on narrow
scenario_context: Date picker. Wide form: inline calendar visible. Narrow: button opens dialog with calendar.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Inline saves clicks.\n2. Dialog saves space.\n3. Container/viewport-aware.

title: WebAssembly canvas rendering for high-performance graphics on all devices
scenario_context: Graph rendering at 60fps on low-end mobile. Use WebAssembly + canvas for performance.
responsive_reasoning: 1. WASM faster than JS.\n2. Canvas avoids DOM overhead.\n3. DPR + adaptive resolution.

layout_strategy.information_density_changes: Could reduce detail on slow devices

accessibility_across_viewports: Canvas needs ARIA description + text alternative for content.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Performance scales. 2) Universal hardware. 3) Native canvas.

title: Hook combining all viewport conditions: size + orientation + pointer + preferences
scenario_context: All-in-one hook for context-aware components. Combines all relevant viewport conditions.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Centralized context.\n2. Single subscription set.\n3. Per responsive-227.
solution: // See responsive-227 DeviceProvider for full pattern.

title: Form fields hierarchy via container-aware spacing
scenario_context: Form group hierarchy: section > group > field. Spacing scales per container.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container drives spacing scale.\n2. Hierarchy maintained.\n3. Per responsive-304.
solution: // See responsive-304 + nested groups via container queries.

title: Display tabular numbers for time/dates uniformly
scenario_context: Clock showing 12:34:56. tabular-nums prevents digit width changes.
responsive_reasoning: 1. tabular-nums on time element.\n2. Same font family.\n3. Uniform width.

title: Padding scale system with logical properties (block/inline)
scenario_context: Logical properties (padding-block, margin-inline) work in any writing direction.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Use padding-inline instead of padding-left/right.\n2. RTL auto-flips.\n3. Future-proof.

title: Two-finger gesture to rotate image on touch with keyboard alternative
scenario_context: Two-finger twist to rotate. Mouse + keyboard: button + arrow keys.
responsive_reasoning: 1. TouchEvent for two-finger.\n2. Calculate angle delta.\n3. Alternative for non-touch.

title: Image upload with progress that survives keyboard during caption typing
scenario_context: User uploads image then types caption. Upload progress visible during typing. Keyboard doesn't disrupt progress UI.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Progress in fixed position.\n2. Keyboard inset aware.\n3. Persists.
edge_cases_handled: Keyboard pushes UI but progress sticky

title: Cookie banner that respects safe area on iOS Safari
scenario_context: Cookie consent banner at bottom. iOS Safari Safari with home indicator. Must clear safe area.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-007.\n2. env() padding.\n3. Accept/reject buttons.

title: Photo with EXIF-aware rotation preserved in orientation changes
scenario_context: User uploads photo taken in portrait. Browser ignores EXIF rotation, shows landscape. Detect and rotate.
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS image-orientation: from-image respects EXIF.\n2. Modern browsers default to this.\n3. Pure CSS solution.

title: iPad-specific keyboard shortcuts overlay (Cmd+K to view shortcuts)
scenario_context: iPad user opens shortcuts cheat sheet via Cmd+? or Cmd+/. Modal lists all shortcuts.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Modal with all shortcuts.\n2. Triggered by shortcut itself.\n3. Visible only with keyboard.

title: Settings panel with sub-pages: drill-down on mobile, master-detail desktop
scenario_context: Settings with categories and sub-pages. Mobile: navigation stack. Desktop: master-detail.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Mobile drill-down with back.\n2. Desktop master-detail.\n3. URL drives.
solution: // See responsive-040 ListWithDetail pattern applied to settings.

title: Editable table row with save/cancel buttons aligned
scenario_context: Click row to edit. Row expands with form fields + save/cancel buttons.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Edit mode visual.\n2. Explicit save/cancel.\n3. Auto-cancel on Escape.

title: Toggle switch styled to be touch-friendly on all viewports
scenario_context: Toggle switch (on/off). 44pt minimum on touch. Smaller on desktop OK.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Custom toggle styled checkbox.\n2. 44pt on touch.\n3. Accessible.
solution: // components/Toggle.tsx export function Toggle({ checked, onChange, label }: { checked: boolean; onChange: (v: boolean) => void; label: string }) { return ( ); }
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Pointer-aware size. 2) Native switch role. 3) 44pt touch.

title: Audio waveform that adapts width to container
scenario_context: Visual waveform for audio. Adapts width to container.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Canvas + ResizeObserver.\n2. Sample data to bar count based on width.\n3. Redraw on resize.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real audio element with controls separately.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Width-adaptive bar count. 2) Canvas performance. 3) Universal.

title: Nav with notifications/messages badges in mobile bottom nav
scenario_context: Bottom nav items show badges (unread count). Adaptive size.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Badge at icon corner.\n2. Count visible.\n3. Accessible label.
